title: Jessie Buckley Defends Paul Mescal After Oscar Snub
text: Jessie Buckley expressed strong support for her Hamnet co-star Paul Mescal after he failed to secure a Best Supporting Actor nomination for the 2026 Oscars, despite Buckley earning a Best Actress nod. In an interview with The Hollywood Reporter, Buckley praised Mescal's performance, stating: Yeah, look, I think he's extraordinary in this film. She emphasized their collaborative bond, noting: I know what we created together is something that's so special to us. Buckley stressed that Mescal's contributions were integral to her own performance, declaring: There's no part of Agnes that exists without Paul. She added that any recognition she receives belongs equally to him, as his artistry deeply influenced her portrayal of Agnes Shakespeare. The actress reiterated that Mescal's involvement in the film elevated her work as an actor, describing how he brings collaborators to the core of your humanity. Hamnet received eight Oscar nominations overall, including Best Picture and Best Director for Chloé Zhao.
